name: 3i-framework-video
description: Remotion: From AI Tools to Organizational Transformation — The 3I Framework

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts ThreeIFramework out/video.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts ThreeIFramework --frame=30 --scale=0.5 out/preview.png
